    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta (agent-based V2G simulator with heterogeneous willingness-to-discharge).",
    "R1.7": "No citation-level engagement.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ($0.42 per day in service payments, 4.1 / 3.7 GWh, and 2%/year battery degradation).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no mention of downstream-harm avoidance).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."

rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta (agent-based V2G simulator with heterogeneous willingness-to-discharge).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ($0.42 per day in service payments, 4.1 / 3.7 GWh, and 2%/year battery degradation).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no mention of downstream-harm avoidance).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
